secondary_html: Keeping Up with the Aliapohs
information_html: NPC: Unctuous Adventurer (X:7.0, Y:5.9).

group_meta: How the journal works each week
information: Pick up a journal with sixteen randomized objectives. A new journal appears every Tuesday at 1:00 a.m. PDT.
information_html:
Pick up a journal with sixteen randomized objectives from Khloe Aliapoh.
A new journal appears every Tuesday at 1:00 a.m. PDT.
Your journal is stored in Key Items and you must resolve the previous one before taking another.

group_meta: How the journal works each week
information: Complete journal duties to earn up to 9 seals, one seal per objective.
information_html:
Complete journal duties to earn up to 9 seals, one seal per objective.
Older duties can be cleared unsynced with Unrestricted Party.
Party Finder groups often use "WT" to mean one unsynced clear for Wondrous Tails.

group_meta: How the journal works each week
primary: 3. Hand in the Wondrous Tails Journal
information: Turn it in after 9 seals for the base reward plus line rewards. A journal lasts two weeks.
information_html:
Turn it in after 9 seals for the base reward plus any completed horizontal, vertical, or diagonal lines.
A journal lasts two weeks from the Tuesday it was issued.
Limited Jobs cannot turn in Wondrous Tails journals.

information: Low-level is the default 1-60 journal. High-level expands to 1-100, excludes level 50 trials, and unlocks after finishing Dawntrail.
information_html:
Low-level is the default journal and includes duties from level 1 to 60.
High-level includes duties from level 1 to 100, excludes level 50 trials, and gives 3 reward options per tier.
As of Patch 7.0, high-level unlocks after completing Dawntrail.

information: Covers dungeon groups, Crystal Tower, Void Ark, Alexander, Bahamut, ARR/Heavensward extremes, bonus duties and PvP.
information_html:
Low-level journal pools include:
Dungeons (Lv. 1-49, 50, 51-59, 60)
Crystal Tower: The Labyrinth of the Ancients | Syrcus Tower | The World of Darkness
Shadow of Mhach: The Void Ark | The Weeping City of Mhach | Dun Scaith
Alexander, Bahamut coils, ARR extremes, Heavensward extremes, Treasure Hunt / Deep Dungeons, and PvP objectives.

information: Covers leveling/high-level dungeons, level 100 dungeons, alliance raid sets, raid series, recent extreme trial groups, bonus duties and PvP.
information_html:
High-level journal pools include:
Leveling and high-level dungeon groups plus Dungeons (Lv. 100)
Alliance raid sets from ARR through Endwalker plus Jeuno: The First Walk | San d'Oria: The Second Walk
Raid series from Bahamut through AAC, Heavensward / Stormblood / Shadowbringers / Endwalker extreme pools, Treasure Hunt / Deep Dungeons, and PvP objectives.
Castrum Meridianum | The Praetorium do not count for the High-level Dungeons (Lv. 50 & 60) objective.

information: Rewards are cumulative across 9 Seals, 1 Line, 2 Lines and 3 Lines.
information_html:
Reward tiers are cumulative.
9 Seals: 50% combat EXP plus one of Allagan Platinum Piece | Allagan Tomestones of Poetics | Timeworn Gargantuaskin Map
1 Line: MGP Gold Card | Khloe's Bronze Certificate of Commendation | Allagan Tomestones of Mnemonics
2 Lines: MGP Platinum Card | Khloe's Silver Certificate of Commendation | Allagan Tomestones of Mathematics
3 Lines: MGP Platinum Card | Khloe's Gold Certificate of Commendation | Khloe's Silver Certificate of Commendation

information: Earn up to 9 points from first-timer clears. Retry costs 1 point and Shuffle costs 2 points.
information_html:
Earn up to 9 Second Chance points by clearing objectives with party members who are new to the duty.
Retry costs 1 point and lets you rerun a completed duty for another sticker.
Shuffle costs 2 points and rearranges seals; it is only available between 3 and 7 stickers.
Guildhests are ineligible for Second Chance points.

information: Seven achievements track completed series from 1 to 50. Notable rewards are Khloe's Friend at 5 and Khloe's Best Friend at 50.
information_html:
The achievement series runs from And Khloe Was Her Name-o I | And Khloe Was Her Name-o VII.
Notable rewards are Khloe's Friend | Khloe's Best Friend.
For achievement credit, only the 9 seals are required; lines are not needed.
